package.name: burger_worlds
package.description: Vendored Gazebo Classic simulation worlds for the TurtleBot3 Burger stack. Ships two AWS RoboMaker worlds plus their models and reference maps: "small_house" (worlds/small_house/small_house.world, the default residential world) and "office" (worlds/office/service.world, AWS RoboMaker / OSRF ServiceSim). Loaded via burger_bringup's sim.launch.py (world:=small_house | office).
